title: Add within 1,000 using place value blocks
description: Practice adding numbers using place value blocks. All numbers used and sums are within 1000.
topic_path: Add within 1,000 using place value blocks

assessment_items.question_content:
**Add.**  
*Hint: Use the place value blocks to help solve.*

$\Large{\purpleD{736} + \maroonD{58} ={}}$[[☃ numeric-input 1]]

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/28a31945ee64f6781d4e582948ac38b13e726d10)
hints: Let's use the place value blocks on the chart to help us solve.

We can put our two numbers together on the place value chart.

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/55c99df4130ebf7d1298062888cab61fa5ae0bd9)

There are $7\text{ hundreds}, 8\text{ tens}$ and $14\text{ ones}$.

Now we can take our $14\text{ ones}$ and make $1\text{ ten}$ and $4\text{ ones}$.

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/5d36a7c353b1cbb8302eac572b9f4b6cbe8ee022)

In all, there are $7\text{ hundreds}, 9\text{ tens}$ and $4\text{ ones}$.

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/9d10ddb4651815840b7eca5d0c349b4b5f29bf51)

$700 + 90+ 4= 794$
$\Large{\purpleD{736} + \maroonD{58} =\blueE{794}}$

assessment_items.question_content:
**Add.**  
*Hint: Use the place value blocks to help solve.*

$\Large{\purpleD{274} + \maroonD{528} ={}}$[[☃ numeric-input 1]]

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/3aaf4c602490af64e10f7eba8c7b85e70bc7e1a8)
hints: Let's use the place value blocks on the chart to help us solve.

We can put our two numbers together on the place value chart.

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/d8341deacd7f090bf69250e8a92441e61c23348c)

There are $7\text{ hundreds}, 9\text{ tens}$ and $12\text{ ones}$.

We can take our $12\text{ ones}$ and make $1\text{ ten}$ and $2\text{ ones}$.

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/6e77b93b4ed476a6bee3e8659abacc21305a3974)

Now, we have $7\text{ hundreds}, 10\text{ tens}$ and $2\text{ ones}$.

We can take our $10\text{ tens}$ and turn them into $1\text{ hundred}$.

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/2cd6a18fcd6e7e765a6f8f215b4c42e32e9968e8)

In all, there are $8\text{ hundreds}, 0\text{ tens}$ and $2\text{ ones}$.

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/a847abf1655e94c77e59ce0ef7cfbdebcda86c08)

$800 + 0 + 2= 802$
$\Large{\purpleD{274} + \maroonD{528} =\blueE{802}}$

assessment_items.question_content:
**Which equation can be represented by the place value blocks below?**

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/b4812b7cd88e1e632a6dc02fe1d6a05170b4615d)

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints:
The first set of blocks shows $\purpleD2$ hundreds, $\purpleD3$ tens, and $\purpleD6$ ones so, our first addend is $\purpleD{236}$.

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/2963e8bf519568f11fa061d1302a12f4306e8bfc)

The second set of blocks shows $\maroonD3$ hundreds, $\maroonD4$ tens, and $\maroonD2$ ones so, our second addend is $\maroonD{342}$.

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/8534f9a78950419e1841441ff96f2a8dc49f6c01)

Together, there are $\blueE5$ hundreds, $\blueE7$ tens, and $\blueE8$ ones.

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/257fbb3afd53993aa0a46e46d9f14ef6787553d1)

$500 + 70 + 8 =\blueE{578}$

This equation represents the place value blocks:

$\purpleE{236} + \maroonD{342} = \blueE{578}$
